hero.headline: Storm damage or *just getting old*?
hero.subheadline: We'll tell you exactly what's happening up there — no sales pitch, just the truth about your Montgomery roof.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Every part of your roof system
services_section.subheading: From storm damage to worn-out shingles — we handle it all

services.title: Storm Damage Inspection
services.description: Hail, wind, and fallen trees leave marks. We'll document every bit of damage for insurance claims.

services.title: Roof Replacement
services.description: When repair isn't enough, we tear off the old and install new shingles that'll last decades.

services.title: Leak Repair
services.description: Water stains on your ceiling? We'll track down the source and seal it permanently.

services.title: Insurance Claims Help
services.description: We work directly with adjusters and document everything to maximize your coverage.

about.heading: The roofing team Montgomery trusts
about.body: We're the Montgomery roofers who show up when we say we will. Honest assessments, quality work, and we'll even help you save money with your insurance company.

reviews.name: Michael M.
reviews.text: Mike came out and did an excellent roof inspection. Very professional and honest — took time to explain everything he found.

reviews.name: Caleb D.
reviews.text: Straightforward and honest. I appreciated how clearly Mike explained everything about my roof.

reviews.name: Christina W.
reviews.text: Quality and trustworthy! They even pointed out things insurance might cover to save us money.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Montgomery and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Local roofing expertise throughout River Region

cta.heading: Ready for straight answers about your roof?
cta.body: Free inspection, honest assessment, and a clear plan forward. No pressure — just the facts about what your roof needs.
